message:
fix(runtime,trace): mark spawned task notified + assert matches in test

Two independent bug fixes:

runtime/state.rs: After storing a newly spawned task, immediately call
wake_state.notify() on its record. The caller (drain_ready_async_finalizers)
will push the task into the ready queue, but without the notify flag set
there is a window where poll_next_ready() could skip the task because its
wake state reads as quiescent. This closes a race between task spawn and
the first scheduling pass.

trace/event.rs: A test was using bare `matches!(reason, DownReason::Cancelled(_))`
as a statement, which compiles (it's a bool expression) but never actually
asserts anything—the result was silently discarded. Wrapping it in
`assert!(...)` ensures the test fails if the trace event carries the wrong
exit reason variant.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
